infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CityFix needs your location to tag problem reports.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CityFix needs camera access to take photos of issues.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CityFix needs photo library access to attach images to reports.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow CityFix to use your location.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow CityFix to access your photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow CityFix to use your camera.
